name: City Car Parking & Driving Simulator VR

reviews.review_description: I supposed it was gonna be good quality and good turning but the turning is buns when i need to turn right i turn left and it get annoying but good game i cant lie?

Wow I'm actually surprised how bad this game is
Gives you zero driving experience
And as a game it is also terrible ( handling the car ... I can't even compare it to anything. The wheel just turns over one point when turning and good luck getting back from that with any speed. )

Buy a matchbox instead and roll it around the carpet.
